nasb.text: By the way that he came, by the same he will return, and he shall not come to this city,” ’ declares the Lord.

esv.text: By the way that he came, by the same he shall return, and he shall not come into this city, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 他必循他來的路回去，他必不能來到這城，這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他从哪条路来，也将从哪条路回去，他必进不了这城。这是耶和华说的。
